name: Jeb Bush
subject: Jeb Jr., Columba, now me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend -

**Jeb Jr. emailed, Columba emailed, and now I 'm asking.**

[**We only have 12 hours before our crucial End of Month deadline and I need you to step up and chip in $5 right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2657:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

**This deadline is so important to me that I have lined up a few major donors who are going to match every contribution dollar for dollar until midnight tonight.**

This is the first major deadline since Hillary jumped in the race, and she is already raising millions of dollars.

[**We need to fight back right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2658:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
**Friend**
**Committed to Defeating Hillary:****???**
.

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2659:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE).

In 12 hours we will close the books on April, and one of two things will happen:

1. We hit our goal and can send a message to Hillary and other Democrats that we won't stand for their liberal overreaches in 2016.
2. We will fall short, and the Democrats will see that as a sign that we're not prepared for this fight.

**Friend , if you're anything like me, you hate to lose. So it's pretty clear that we need to hit our goal before midnight tonight.**

This is your last chance to send a message to Hillary and the Democrats before our fundraising deadline tonight.

**[Friend , I need you to step up and chip in $100, $50, $25, or whatever you can right now before midnight tonight.](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2660:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)**

Your contributions will show Hillary and Democrats that they have a big fight on their hands in 2016, so please, step up before midnight: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/Help-Stop-Hillary/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2661:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Thank you for standing with us in this fight.

Jeb

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2662:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE).
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=307&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: We could make it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41831386:16815422358:m:1:1349778030:EBF62D214966B2704270005BC3879FAA:r)
---
Peter, I just checked in on our April fundraising totals and we're actually about $25,000 away from setting a record pace online for our first month. So we need your help. If you help us by donating $20 or more right now, we'll send you one of these limited edition T-shirts from our end-of-month flash sale. **[_Click here to donate and get yours now._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41831387:16815422358:m:1:1349778030:EBF62D214966B2704270005BC3879FAA:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41831387:16815422358:m:1:1349778030:EBF62D214966B2704270005BC3879FAA:r) We've been so fortunate to have so many generous supporters step up and help Marco and the campaign in these first few weeks. If getting Marco's message to as many voters as possible is important to you, [_**click here to donate $20 or more and we 'll send you a limited edition T-shirt.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41831387:16815422358:m:1:1349778030:EBF62D214966B2704270005BC3879FAA:r) Thanks for the help! Terry Sullivan Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41831388:16815422358:m:1:1349778030:EBF62D214966B2704270005BC3879FAA:r)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: : Need 1 person from 34223
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I'm running for Senate in one of the most competitive races in the country. Falling short is not an option.Friend -- I don't mean to be blunt, but this is serious: **The April fundraising deadline is just hours away. Unless we act quickly, we risk falling short of our 3,000 donation goal.** Remember, I'm running for Senate in one of the most competitive races in the country. Falling short is not an option. **So here's what I'm asking:** We need at least 1 person from the 34223 zip code to chip in by midnight to make sure we hit our goal. Can I count on you to make a contribution today? _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?express_lane=true&refcode=ema_2015-04-30_b1_pm_ldnd-rem&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Scott Walker
subject: Last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[****](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI1NzQzOTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMDA0NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
******

Peter,

We noticed that you have not had the opportunity to contribute to Our American Revival. [Will you stand with us as we fight for smaller, more responsive government?
](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1NzQzOTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMDA0NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
As the last day of April, this is your last chance to contribute towards our April fundraising goal. We are only **47 donations** away from our goal. It is important that we hit our monthly goal so that we can aggressively fight for the same big, bold reforms that I have been able to enact in Wisconsin.

[Will you consider making a secure contribution of $25 or more before midnight tonight?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1NzQzOTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMDA0NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Scott Walker

__
__
__
__
__
_**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1NzQzOTQS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMDA0NzY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**_

**

****
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community.
